name: Al Zayni Barakat
overview: Following the decline of the Mamluk state and the emergence of the Ottoman Empire, the series depicts the sufferings of people living amidst social and political upheaval. When the enigmatic and ruthless Zayni Barakat Ibn Musa takes control, the truth of his rule and character unfolds.

trailers.title: الزيني بركات ׀ أحمد بدير – نبيل الحلفاوي ׀ الحلقة 01 من 21
